title: 10 best herbal tinctures for tinnitus
description: Brahmi tinctures helps with tinnitus because of its potent adaptogenic properties, which work to balance the nervous system and alleviate stress-related auditory disturbances. The herb's ability to enhance cognitive function, memory, and focus also plays a significant role in calming the mind and reducing mental chatter that can exacerbate tinnitus symptoms.
